title: Claim Denied – Action Required
message: Your claim HZN-2024-00012610 for Dr. James Wilson has been denied. Prior authorization was required but not obtained. You may appeal this decision within 180 days.

title: Claim Processed Successfully
message: Your claim HZN-2024-00012345 for Dr. Sarah Mitchell has been approved. Plan paid $304.00. Your responsibility is $76.00.

title: Claim Under Review
message: Your claim HZN-2024-00012456 for Newark General Hospital is currently under review. Additional documentation may be requested. We will notify you when a decision is made.

title: New Document Available
message: Your Explanation of Benefits for Dr. Emily Rodriguez (10/08/2024) is now available in the Document Center.

title: Scheduled Maintenance Notice
message: The Horizon Member Portal will undergo scheduled maintenance on Saturday, November 2, 2024 from 2:00 AM to 6:00 AM ET. Some features may be temporarily unavailable during this time.

title: Deductible Milestone Reached
message: You have met your individual deductible of $1,500.00 for the 2024 plan year. Your cost-sharing benefits will now apply at the coinsurance level for covered services.

title: Prescription Claim Approved
message: Your pharmacy claim HZN-2024-00012501 at CVS Pharmacy has been processed. Plan paid $155.00. Your copay was $30.00.

title: Pending Claim – Cardiology Visit
message: Your claim HZN-2024-00012720 for Dr. Angela Torres is pending processing. Estimated amounts are shown on your claims page. Final amounts may differ.

title: Preventive Care Reminder
message: It's time to schedule your annual wellness visit. Preventive care is covered at 100% with no member cost share under your PPO plan. Stay on top of your health!

title: Appeal Submitted – Dental Crown
message: Your appeal for claim HZN-2024-00013250 (dental crown with Dr. Robert Chen) has been received. The appeals department will review your case within 30 days.

title: Immunizations Covered at 100%
message: Your claim HZN-2024-00013375 for immunizations with Dr. David Kim has been approved. Preventive immunizations are covered at 100% with no member cost share.

title: 2024 Open Enrollment Reminder
message: Open enrollment for the 2025 plan year begins November 1, 2024. Review your current benefits and explore plan options to ensure you have the coverage that best fits your needs.
